pricing.title: No surprises,
pricing.sub: Fair pricing, professional delivery and real support. Choose the right plan for your business.

plans.name: Starter
plans.desc: Ideal for those who need a fast, modern and reliable website without monthly content changes.

plans.note: Includes creation, hosting, maintenance, 5 post-delivery adjustment rounds, dedicated support, dynamic content and dedicated control panel.

about.title: Real
about.text1: Ocyan-Tech is not a template store. We are developers who understand business — and we build websites that work as a tool, not as a static business card.
about.text2: With over 22 years of technical experience and a technology degree, we combine engineering rigor with business vision to deliver solutions that generate real results.

highlights.text: No stalling. Deadline set, deadline met.

highlights.title: Human support via WhatsApp
highlights.text: You talk to the person who built your site. Not a support chatbot.
